title: senecio hirsutilobus
intro: Senecio hirsutilobus, also known as Rough Groundsel, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. The plant contains pyrrolizidine alkaloids, which have been used for their medicinal properties, such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Consuming the plant can provide health benefits like reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, but excessive consumption can be toxic. In herbal preparations, Senecio hirsutilobus is often used in teas, infusions, or tinctures, but it's essential to consult a healthcare professional before using it for medicinal purposes.
